manual_step_summary: Source-family validation case: orientation_x_short; build axis-aligned x-dipole from start/end coordinates, export matched local E/H probe CSVs and farfield reference.
Source-family validation case: orientation_y_short; build axis-aligned y-dipole from start/end coordinates, export matched local E/H probe CSVs and farfield reference.
Source-family validation case: orientation_x_halfwave; build axis-aligned x-dipole from start/end coordinates, export matched local E/H probe CSVs and farfield reference.
Source-family validation case: orientation_y_halfwave; build axis-aligned y-dipole from start/end coordinates, export matched local E/H probe CSVs and farfield reference.
Source-family validation case: off_axis_x_translation_short; build axis-aligned z-dipole from start/end coordinates, export matched local E/H probe CSVs and farfield reference.
Source-family validation case: off_axis_y_translation_halfwave; build axis-aligned z-dipole from start/end coordinates, export matched local E/H probe CSVs and farfield reference.
